summary.text: [0-12] A person wearing a grey cap and glasses stands before a black chalkboard, speaking with their mouth opening to reveal teeth. The chalkboard displays social media handles in white chalk: "Facebook: Facebook/Pizza B's", "Twitter: @Pizza_Bs", and "Instagram: @Pizzabosco". The background wall is reddish-orange. [12-14] The scene cuts to a high-angle view of a person in a white chef's coat standing at a counter. A white bowl and a shaker are visible on the surface, and the floor has light-colored square tiles. [14-16] High-angle shot shows an individual in a white chef's coat standing motionless at a counter. A white shaker is on the left, a white bowl on the right. Light tiles and a dark floor mat are visible. "VivaVideo" text is in the bottom-right corner. [16-18] The person leans forward, placing hands on the counter near the bowl, shifting from a static posture to engaging with the workspace. [18-20] They lift a large, round mass of pale dough resting on a white sheet up towards the camera lens, bringing it into close-up view. [20-22] The dough on the white sheet is lowered back to the counter surface. Hands are visible adjusting the dough on the paper. [22-24] The

[144-152] An individual wearing a white chef's coat and grey cap stands at a white counter, leaning forward to work on a beige dough log. They use both hands to roll and press the dough, aiming to tighten and refine its cylindrical shape. The person moves their hands along the length of the log to ensure an even form. A white shaker sits stationary on the left side of the counter, and a white bucket is placed on the right. In the background, a tiled floor and a dark mat are visible. The "VivaVideo" watermark appears in the bottom right corner. The chef continues this rolling and pressing motion consistently throughout the duration.

[152-160] An individual in a white chef's coat and grey cap leans over a white counter, rolling a beige dough log back and forth with both hands. They press and shape the cylinder to refine its form, adjusting their grip along the length. To the left, a white shaker and a pizza cutter with a black handle sit stationary, while a large white bucket remains on the right. The chef leans lower to apply pressure, ensuring an even shape. The tiled floor and dark mat are visible in the background. The "VivaVideo" watermark appears in the bottom right.

[160-168] A chef wearing a white coat and grey cap leans over a white counter, using both hands to roll and shape a beige dough log. The individual continuously presses and manipulates the dough to refine its cylindrical form. To the left, a pizza cutter with a black handle and a white shaker remain stationary. On the right side, a large white bucket sits undisturbed. The chef maintains a forward-leaning posture, focusing on the dough. The background shows a tiled floor and a dark mat beneath the chef. The "VivaVideo" watermark is visible in the bottom right corner.

[26-28] A person in a white chef's coat extends their right arm to grasp a dough ball near a white bowl on the right, while a shaker remains on the left. [52-54] The individual, now seen wearing a grey cap, presses and flattens the beige dough outwards with both hands on the white counter. [102-104] The person stands upright with hands clasped; the dough is now covered in red sauce and white shreds. [168-170] The chef leans forward to roll the beige dough into a cylinder using both hands, with a pizza cutter visible near the shaker on the left and a white bucket on the right. The text "VivaVideo" is visible in the bottom right corner.
